programme.title: Valpolicella

programme.desc: ... Champions League. - Tedeschi alla terza finale di UCL: una vinta nel 1997 e una persa nel 2013. Real alla sesta in 11 stagioni con 5 vittorie. Ha vinto gli ultimi 2 precedenti. TC: Zancan-Marchegiani.

programme.title: Real Madrid - Atletico M. 2014
programme.desc: ... Madrid UEFA Champions League Story. - Per la prima volta nella storia della Champions la finale e' un derby. A Lisbona si affrontano Real e Atletico, con la squadra di Ancelotti che sogna di alzare "la decima".

programme.title: La Coppa dei Campioni
programme.desc: ... #SkyBuffaRacconta Storie di Champions. - Il pretesto, la nascita del format e tutti i retroscena che nel 1956 portarono a disputare la prima finale di Coppa dei Campioni, ora Champions League.

programme.title: Liverpool - Real Madrid 28/05/22
programme.desc: ... Champions League. - Ultima finale dei Reds nel 2019, 2-0 sul Tottenham. Ultima del Real nel 2018, 3-1 sul Liverpool. Quinta finale di Champions per Ancelotti. Quarta per Klopp. TC: Marianella-Marchegiani.

programme.title: Review Of The Season
programme.desc: ... League Magazine. - L'attenzione e' rivolta alla finale tra Paris Saint Germain e Arsenal, giocata alla Puskas Arena di Budapest. Un'occasione per rivivere momenti salienti, interviste esclusive ai protagonisti e retroscena della massima competizione europea.

programme.title: Juventus - Barcellona 24/05/15
programme.desc: ... UEFA Champions League Story. - Dopo 12 anni, la Juventus torna in finale di Champions League. A Berlino, l'avversario della squadra di Allegri e' il Barcellona di Leo Messi.

programme.title: Ep. 4
programme.desc: Riviviamo il trionfo in Champions League di Ferguson e Ronaldo nella finale inglese terminata ai rigori tra United e Chelsea e la vittoria della "decima" del Real di Ancelotti nel derby di Madrid.

programme.title: Milan - Ajax 1969
programme.desc: ... Champions League Story. - Riviviamo i momenti piu' esaltanti di questa competizione attraverso le partite piu' interessanti. Buon divertimento!

programme.title: Ep. 2
programme.desc: I momenti che hanno reso unica la Champions League raccontati da chi l'ha vinta: in questo episodio i protagonisti di Bayern Monaco, Ajax e Juventus.

programme.title: La rovesciata di Rooney
programme.desc: Il 12 febbraio 2011 Wayne Rooney segna in rovesciata per lo United il gol piu' iconico dei derby di Manchester. Riviviamo le emozioni di un momento che restera' nella storia della Premier.

programme.title: La Giovane Italia 2026 Ep.17 18/06/2026
programme.desc: ... 18/06/2026 La giovane Italia. - Servizi informativi dedicati ai piu' piccoli sportivi italiani e alle realta' giovanili legate al calcio, tra trofei, incontri, e storie.

programme.title: Cagliari - Inter (diretta)
programme.desc: Sardi reduci da 2 vittorie di fila (Parma e Lecce). Un solo successo a Cagliari nelle ultime 10 sfide con l'Inter. I nerazzurri vengono dal 2-1 sul Sassuolo. TC: Compagnoni-Gobbi

programme.title: Tutti i gol di Del Piero in Champions
programme.desc: Una compilation di gol indimenticabili: riviviamo insieme le 42 reti che la bandiera della Juventus Alessandro Del Piero ha segnato in Champions League nel corso della sua carriera.

programme.title: Barcellona - Man Utd 2011
programme.desc: ... Barcellona UEFA Champions League Story. - Riviviamo i momenti piu' esaltanti di questa competizione attraverso le partite piu' interessanti. Buon divertimento!

programme.title: Speciale Inter: Tutti I Gol Dello Scudetto
programme.desc: ... Scudetto Inter Scudetto 2026. - Tutti i gol della cavalcata della squadra nerazzurra per lo scudetto numero 21, quello dell'anima nerazzurra.

programme.title: Liverpool - Arsenal
programme.desc: Reds reduci dal successo esterno contro il Newcastle (2-3). L'Arsenal viene dal 5-0 sul Leeds. Ad Anfield non vince in Premier da 13 anni, 5 pareggi e 7 ko. TC: Massimo Marianella

programme.title: Lo sbarco del fenomeno: Ronnie e l'Inter
Julian Dicks
programme.desc: Julian Dicks ha giocato 262 partite con il West Ham, venendo eletto quattro volte miglior giocatore della stagione. Scopriamo la storia dell'attuale manager del Chelmsford City.

programme.title: Bayern M. - Inter 2010
programme.desc: ... UEFA Champions League Story. - 22 Maggio 2010, al Santiago Bernabeu di Madrid, Inter e Bayern Monaco si sfidano nella finale di Champions League. Per i nerazzurri sara' il terzo titolo della storia

programme.title: Calciomercato - L'originale
programme.desc: Curiosita', commenti, notizie e anticipazioni sui possibili movimenti del calciomercato. Condotto dal trio Alessandro Bonan, Gianluca Di Marzio e Fayna.

programme.title: Manchester City - Inter
programme.desc: ... Champions League. - City per il secondo trofeo europeo dopo una Coppa delle Coppe nel 1970. Inter per la seconda Champions League dopo quella del 2010. In bacheca anche 2 Coppe dei Campioni. TC: Caressa-Bergomi.

programme.title: B. Dortmund. - Bayern M. 2013
programme.desc: ... Bayern Monaco UEFA Champions League Story. - E' la prima finale tutta tedesca in Champions League. Il meraviglioso stadio di Wembley a Londra ospita le due squadre tedesche che hanno dominato tutta la stagione di Champions. TC: Marianella-Mauro.

programme.title: La Stella Rossa
programme.desc: ... Storie di Champions. - Dall'alba della prima manifestazione a Belgrado contro Milosevic, al tramonto della Jugoslavia del calcio: il trionfo della Stella Rossa a Bari.

programme.title: Manchester City - Chelsea 2021
programme.desc: ... Champions League Story. - Terza finale di Champions League per il Chelsea, 1 vittoria. Prima per i Citizens che non disputavano una finale europea dal 1970. TC: Marianella-Marchegiani.

programme.title: Calciomercato - L'originale

programme.title: Ep. 3

programme.title: Calciomercato - L'originale

programme.title: Udinese - Milan
programme.desc: Bianconeri ancora imbattuti con 2 vittorie e un pari. Milan a quota 7 punti dopo l'1-0 sul Bologna. In vantaggio 4 a 2 nelle ultime 7 sfide a Udine, un pareggio. TC: Borghi-Serena

programme.title: La rovesciata di Rooney
programme.desc: Il 12 febbraio 2011 Wayne Rooney segna in rovesciata per lo United il gol piu' iconico dei derby di Manchester. Riviviamo le emozioni di un momento che restera' nella storia della Premier.

programme.title: Inter - Lazio 1998
programme.desc: ... Europa League Story. - Riviviamo la finale di Coppa Uefa della stagione 1997/98. Quarta volta nella storia del trofeo che due squadre italiane si incontrano in finale, ma e' la prima in un gara secca.

programme.title: Chivu D’italia
programme.desc: Dal 2003 a oggi. Il viaggio di Chivu da Roma a Milano, passando per Verona e Parma, la notte magica del Triplete, fino alla conquista di 2 trofei da allenatore dell'Inter.

programme.title: 2a g.
programme.desc: Entrambe reduci da una vittoria. Arsenal sullo United (0-1). Leeds sull'Everton (1-0). I gunners a Londra hanno vinto gli ultimi 4 precedenti di Premier. TC: Massimo Marianella

programme.title: Premier League: Storia Della Stagione
programme.desc: L'Arsenal che vince il titolo dopo 22 anni, l'addio di Guardiola al City, il West Ham che saluta la Premier, ma non solo. Riviviamo i momenti piu' significati della stagione.

U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2005
programme.desc: The official film of the 2005 US Open, chronicling Michael Campbell's triumph at Pinehurst after fending off Retief Goosen and Tiger Woods.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2006
programme.desc: Revisit the 2006 US Open, a tournament remembered for Geoff Ogilvy's late surge to the crown, outlasting home favourite Phil Mickelson.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2007
programme.desc: The story of the 2007 US Open Championship at Oakmont Country Club in Pennsylvania. Geoff Ogilvy was aiming to become the first player to retain his title since Curtis Strange in 1989.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2008
programme.desc: Ahead of the US Open, the year's second golf major, take a look back to 2008 with the official film of the tournament. Argentina's Angel Cabrera was the defending champion from 2007.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2009
programme.desc: A review of the 2009 US Open which was held at Bethpage State Park, New York. It was the second Major of the year and another memorable event, with American Lucas Glover the victor.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2010
programme.desc: A look back at the 2010 US Open at Pebble Beach Golf Links. It was a tournament that saw Ryder Cup star Graeme McDowell take his game to a whole new level.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2011
programme.desc: A chance to relive the 2011 US Open which was held at Congressional Country Club in Maryland. Northern Ireland's Rory McIlroy stormed to the first Major title of his career.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2012
programme.desc: The story of the 2012 US Open Championship from the Olympic Club in San Francisco. Northern Irishman Rory McIlroy won this tournament by an incredible eight strokes in 2011.

programme.title: PGA Tour Champions Highlights
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the American Family Insurance Championship - a PGA Tour Champions team event held at TPC Wisconsin.

programme.title: McGinley & Chamblee At The US Open
programme.desc: Join Paul McGinley and Brandel Chamblee as they preview the action ahead of the 126th edition of the US Open Championship at Shinnecock Hills.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2001
programme.desc: Producing one of the wildest endings in championship history, the 2001 US Open at Southern Hills Country Club in Tulsa, Oklahoma, was one to remember.

programme.title: McGinley & Chamblee At The US Open
programme.desc: Join Paul McGinley and Brandel Chamblee as they preview the action ahead of the 126th edition of the US Open Championship at Shinnecock Hills.

programme.title: Live From The US Open
programme.desc: The 126th US Open Championship is almost here - join the game's leading stars and pundits for all the build-up ahead of the third men's Major of 2026.

programme.title: US Open Golf Official Film 2017
programme.desc: The official film of the 2017 US Open. Hosted at Erin Hills in Wisconsin, Dustin Johnson came into the tournament as the defending champion from the previous year.

programme.title: US Open Golf Official Film 2015
programme.desc: The official film of the 2015 US Open, one of golf's four majors. Martin Kaymer went in as the defending champion from 2014.

programme.title: Rose Ladies Series Golf
programme.desc: Comprising five one-day warm-up tournaments across England for stars of the LET, the 2026 edition of the Rose Ladies Series concluded at North Hants Golf Club.

programme.title: PGA Tour Champions Highlights
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the Principal Charity Classic - a PGA Tour Champions event held at the Wakonda Club. Spain's Miguel Angel Jiménez conquered the rest a year ago.

programme.title: HotelPlanner Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the Interwetten Open during the 2026 season of the HotelPlanner Tour, the second tier of men's professional golf in Europe.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2013
programme.desc: A chance to relive the 2013 US Open at Merion Golf Club in Ardmore, Pennsylvania. America's Webb Simpson claimed a narrow one-stroke victory the previous year.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2014
programme.desc: The story of the 2014 US Open Championship at the No. 2 Course of the Pinehurst Resort in North Carolina. England's Justin Rose came into this event as the defending champion.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2015
programme.desc: The official film of the 2015 US Open, one of golf's four majors. Martin Kaymer went in as the defending champion from 2014.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2016
programme.desc: The official film of the 2016 US Open. Hosted at Oakmont Country Club in Pennsylvania, one of the world's most difficult courses, Jordan Spieth came in as the defending champion.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2017
programme.desc: The official film of the 2017 US Open. Hosted at Erin Hills in Wisconsin, Dustin Johnson came into the tournament as the defending champion from the previous year.

programme.title: Rose Ladies Series Golf
programme.desc: Comprising five one-day warm-up tournaments across England for stars of the LET, the 2026 edition of the Rose Ladies Series concluded at North Hants Golf Club.

programme.title: HotelPlanner Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the Interwetten Open during the 2026 season of the HotelPlanner Tour, the second tier of men's professional golf in Europe.

programme.title: PGA Tour Champions Highlights
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the Principal Charity Classic - a PGA Tour Champions event held at the Wakonda Club. Spain's Miguel Angel Jiménez conquered the rest a year ago.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2017
programme.desc: The official film of the 2017 US Open. Hosted at Erin Hills in Wisconsin, Dustin Johnson came into the tournament as the defending champion from the previous year.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2018
programme.desc: The official film of the 2018 US Open, held at Shinnecock Hills Golf Course. On an exceptionally challenging course, Brooks Koepka was aiming to retain his title from 2017.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2019
programme.desc: The official film of the 2019 US Open from the iconic Pebble Beach Golf Links. It was to be a memorable tournament on the California coast for a first-time Major winner.

programme.title: McGinley & Chamblee At The US Open
programme.desc: Join Paul McGinley and Brandel Chamblee as they preview the action ahead of the 126th edition of the US Open Championship at Shinnecock Hills.

programme.title: Live US Open Golf Round 1
programme.desc: The opening round of the 126th US Open Championship at Shinnecock Hills Golf Club. JJ Spaun snatched Major glory last year with a two-shot win over Scotland's Robert MacIntyre.

programme.title: British Kart Champs Highlights
programme.desc: Opening-round highlights from the 2026 British Kart Championship, taking place at Warden Law circuit in Sunderland.

programme.title: British Kart Champs Highlights
programme.desc: Second-round highlights from the 2026 British Kart Championship, taking place at Whilton Mill in Northamptonshire.

programme.title: British Kart Champs Highlights
programme.desc: Third-round highlights from the 2026 season of the British Kart Championship.

programme.desc: One of motorsport's most iconic races arrives with the Italian Grand Prix, held at the Autodromo Nazionale Monza. Charles Leclerc was the champion at this race last year.

programme.title: The Best of F1 2020
programme.desc: The 2020 Formula 1 season continues with the Tuscan Grand Prix from Mugello. This race - new for this unique season - is the second of two in Italy.

programme.title: The Best of F1 2020
programme.desc: The 2020 Russian Grand Prix arrives from the Sochi Autodrom. Lewis Hamilton was the winner of this race when it was held in 2019.

programme.title: The Best of F1 2020
programme.desc: The F1 season motors on to its latest race at the 2020 Eifel Grand Prix from the Nürburgring. This is the first time a race has been held here since 2013.

programme.title: Barcelona F3: Sprint
programme.desc: The third FIA Formula 3 Sprint Race of the season gets underway in Barcelona. Nineteen-year-old Chinese driver Gerrard Xie lines up in reverse-grid pole.

programme.title: Barcelona F3: Feature Race
programme.desc: The FIA Formula 3 Championship weekend concludes with a Feature Race in Barcelona as French star Théophile Nael lines up in pole - his third consecutive P1 start of the season.

programme.title: Golf with Sergio Perez
programme.desc: Sky F1's Simon Lazenby caddies for Formula 1 star Sergio Perez at the Cadillac Open.

programme.title: Barcelona F2: Sprint
programme.desc: The fifth FIA F2 Sprint Race of the season gets underway in Barcelona. Finishing 10th in qualifying yesterday, Campos Racing's Mexican driver Noel León takes on pole here.

programme.title: Barcelona F2: Feature Race
programme.desc: The FIA Formula 2 Championship weekend concludes with a Feature Race in Barcelona. Polesitter Rafael Câmara led an Invicta Racing one-two in qualifying.

programme.desc: It's lights out for the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix. Lewis Hamilton makes a first Ferrari front-row start alongside polesitter George Russell. Kimi Antonelli lines up in third. (14.06)

programme.title: EFL Cup Retro 16:Man City v L'pool
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic League Cup final from years gone by, as Manchester City and Liverpool meet at Wembley back in the 2015-16 final, in a game that went the distance.

programme.title: EFL 14/15: Derby County v Leeds
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic action from the EFL. Here, Derby County take on Leeds United at Pride Park in August 2015 in a game that saw a thrilling late winner.

programme.title: EFL 15/16: Hull City v Reading
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic action from the EFL. Here, Hull City take on Reading at the KC Stadium in December 2015 in a thrilling clash that saw a late winner.

programme.title: EFL 15/16: QPR v Middlesbrough
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, QPR host Middlesbrough in a five-goal thriller at Loftus Road in the 2015-16 season.

programme.title: EFL 15/16: B'ham v Middlesbrough
programme.desc: Relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, Birmingham City take on Middlesbrough at St Andrew's in a four-goal thriller in the 2015-16 season.

programme.title: EFL 15/16:Middlesbrough v Brighton
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Middlesbrough take on Brighton and Hove Albion in a tense Championship promotion decider in May 2016.

programme.title: Championship Season Review 21/22
programme.desc: Revisit the 2021/2022 Sky Bet Championship campaign, as Forest secured their long-awaited return to the promised land of the top flight alongside league winners Fulham and Bournemouth.

programme.title: EFL Cup Best Goals: 2021/22
programme.desc: The 2021/22 EFL Cup threw up some truly stunning goals. Take a look back at the competition's best strikes in this recap of another year of scintillating Carabao Cup action.

programme.title: EFL Trophy Final 2021/22
programme.desc: Rotherham and Sutton meet at Wembley to contest the 2022 Papa John's Trophy. Having both reached this stage via spot kicks in their respective semi-finals, who will emerge the winner?

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: C'Ship 13/14
programme.desc: A look back at some classic Football League play-off finals from years gone by. Here, Derby County take on Queens Park Rangers at Wembley in the Championship play-off final in 2014.

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: League 1 13/14
programme.desc: A look back at some classic Football League play-off finals from years gone by. Here, Leyton Orient face Rotherham United at Wembley in the League One play-off final in 2014.

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: League 2 13/14
programme.desc: A look back at some classic Football League play-off finals from years gone by. Here, Burton Albion and Fleetwood Town meet at Wembley in the League Two play-off final in 2014.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Aston Villa v N. Forest
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Aston Villa play Nottingham Forest in a thrilling draw in September 2016 in the Sky Bet Championship.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Cardiff v Bristol City
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Cardiff City face Bristol City in a Severnside derby in the Sky Bet Championship, in what was Neil Warnock's first game at Cardiff.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Burton v Birmingham
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Burton Albion face Birmingham City in 2016 in the Sky Bet Championship, in what was the sides' first competitive meeting.

programme.title: EFL 16/17:Birmingham v Aston Villa
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, local rivals Birmingham City and Aston Villa clash in the Sky Bet Championship at St Andrew's in October 2016.

programme.title: EFL Cup Retro 13: Bradford v Swans
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic League Cup final from years gone, as Swansea City and League One Bradford City go head-to-head in the 2012-13 campaign for the season's first silverware.

programme.title: EFL Cup Retro 17: Man Utd v S'ton
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic League Cup final from years gone by, as Manchester United and Southampton meet in the 2016-17 campaign in a game packed with goals and drama.

programme.title: SPFL: There's Only One Sauzee
programme.desc: Hibernian legend Franck Sauzée sits down with Luke Shanley to reflect on his time in Leith as a Hibs player and manager, and recollect his Champions League success with Marseille in 1993.

programme.title: SPFL: Dundee United - Champions 83
programme.desc: This is the story of Dundee United's 1982-83 title triumph under the revolutionary management of Jim McLean. With interviews from club legends including Paul Hegarty and Maurice Malpas.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Wolves v Derby County
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, Wolves host Derby County at Molineux in a five-goal thriller back in a Bonfire Night sizzler in 2016.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: N. Forest v Newcastle
programme.desc: Relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, Nottingham Forest take on Newcastle United at the City Ground in a game that saw two red cards and two penalties.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Leeds Utd v Aston Villa
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Leeds United face Aston Villa in the Sky Bet Championship, with the sides meeting in the league for the first time since 2004.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Huddersfield v Leeds
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, a West Yorkshire derby as Huddersfield Town play Leeds United in 2017 in the Sky Bet Championship.

programme.title: Championship Season Review 22/23
programme.desc: Revisit the 2022-2023 Sky Bet Championship campaign - a season that saw Vincent Kompany's Burnley secure their Premier League return alongside Sheffield United and Luton Town.

programme.title: EFL Cup Best Goals: 2022/23
programme.desc: From the Abbey all the way to Wembley - this season's Carabao Cup has thrown up a host of spectacular goals. Look back at the 2022-2023 competition's finest strikes.

programme.title: EFL Trophy Final 2022/23
programme.desc: The moment to shine at Wembley has arrived for Bolton Wanderers and Plymouth Argyle, as the pair turn their attentions away from promotion to the final of the 2022-23 EFL Trophy. (02.04)

programme.title: EFL 18/19: Charlton v Doncaster
programme.desc: Two matches of Sky Bet League 1 semi-final play-off action couldn't separate Charlton Athletic and Doncaster Rovers in 2019, as a date at Wembley hinged on a dramatic penalty shootout.

programme.title: EFL 21/22: Coventry City v Fulham
programme.desc: In October 2021, Coventry took Fulham to the sword, putting four past the travelling west Londoners who eventually went on to secure Premier League promotion.

programme.title: EFL 21/22: Blackburn v Fulham
programme.desc: In a Sky Bet Championship encounter to remember for the visitors - and one to forget for the hosts - the travelling Fulham put seven unanswered goals past a hapless Blackburn at Ewood Park.

programme.title: Championship Season Review 24/25
programme.desc: Revisit the 2024-2025 Sky Bet Championship campaign, a season that saw Leeds United and Burnley secure Premier League returns alongside Sunderland via the play-offs.

programme.title: EFL Cup Best Goals: 2024/25
programme.desc: From the Valley all the way to Wembley - this season's Carabao Cup has thrown up a host of stunning goals. Look back at the finest strikes from the 2024-25 competition.

programme.title: EFL Trophy Final 2024/25
programme.desc: In the final of the 2024-2025 EFL Trophy, Birmingham City and Peterborough compete at Wembley Stadium. (13.04)
